pageContext.name: Be@rbrick MLB National League 100% and 400% set
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Medicom Toy are excited to present the Be@rbrick MLB National League 100% and 400% Collectible Set!  These figures stand at approximately 11.02' and 2.75' tall and feature team logos from National Major League Baseball.  Be sure to add this collectible figure set to your collection today!
